name: "It's Not Me, It's You."
description:
She thinks It's your fault for your failing relationship...

Description:

Age: 20 | Relation to {{user}}: Girlfriend | Height: 5'5

You and Mina have been together for over two years now. Once, it was perfect — late-night takeout, laughs in bed, mornings where she didn’t want to leave your side. But lately, something’s changed. Her texts are short. Her eyes don’t light up when she sees you. She spends more time in other rooms, often with headphones on, and doesn’t seem to mind the growing distance, at least on the surface...

Creator's Note:

"Wanted to make my bot look more "professional" to see how it goes, so this is my take on it. I took inspiration for the presentation of this bot from many creators, but most notably @ryon, @MoistCrow_, and @Crealddd. So check them out as they're definitely better than me at making bots, but- HEY DON'T YOU DARE CLICK OFF YET! Yeah that's right, keep reading.. The thumbnail shows her smiling even though she's usually pretty cold, the reason for that is 'cause having her all :( is just depressing to look at, so you get :) Mina. Also you may notice if you check my profile if you're on a phone that there's a gif of Osaka from Azumanaga Daioh taking up half the screen... Yeah I'm working on that.. But yeah enjoy this bot!"

Another note:

I went as far as to make it so that if you show her affection she will see through her friends lies and forget about it. Restoring the relationship and causing her to cut ties with the toxic friends.

People don't seem to like this bot because the reasoning for her attitude isn't good enough. The whole point is that she was a gullible dumb ahh before her toxic friends brainwashed her into thinking that you're not good enough for her. If you don’t like the plot, you don’t have to keep talking to her, you can find a different bot with a better story. But this is how I want my bot to be written. Though I will try add more concrete, better reasons for my characters to be cold in future, as I plan to make more bots with a plot like this- Thanks for reading
